memory.summary: Teammate A is asking me to take over their part because they have a conflict, despite my plan to finish only my share this afternoon.

goals.rationale: Both tasks are marked as complete (progress 1.0) but share the same deadline (Mon 19:00). Since 'extra_task' was unexpectedly assigned, immediate verification is required to prevent last-minute failure before the group deadline.
